channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fed’s favorite inflation gauge shows there is more work to do to tame price increases
item.description: The Federal Reserve’s preferred inflation gauge showed that prices rose close to 3% in 2025, leaving the central bank with more work to do to get cost...

item.title: GDP grew 2.2% in 2025. The economy might do better this year.
item.description: The U.S. expanded at a subpar 1.4% annual pace in the fourth quarter of 2025, depressed by a record 43-day federal shutdown that caused a big decline ...

item.title: Here’s what Paramount would have to do for Netflix to walk away from its Warner Bros. deal
item.description: A MoffettNathanson analyst says that if Paramount pushes its price above $32 per share, Netflix may be too disciplined to continue bidding on somethin...

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s tariffs. Here’s what the president could try to use instead.
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court said President Trump exceeded his authority in using a 1977 law to justify a large swath of his tariffs, but that does not mean...

item.title: Tariff-proof your partnership: How couples can turn economic hurdles into financial wins
item.description: You don’t need to follow politics for trade policy to affect your relationship. It already does.

item.title: Buy this best-in-class GLP-1 leader as competition heats up, says Barclays
item.description: Barclays' $1,350 price target implies upside of 32%.

item.title: Morgan Stanley is bullish on this aerospace stock, says market underestimates growth drivers
item.description: The bank launched coverage of the aerospace and defense stock with an overweight rating.

item.title: HSBC downgrades this retail giant after earnings, flags weaker outlook
item.description: HSBC's new price forecast implies a 5% upside for shares of Walmart.

item.title: The Dow is just below 50,000. How to trade a move above the key level using options
This industrial giant is off to the races in 2026 after a strong 2025. Why there's more upside ahead
item.description: Caterpillar's has surged 117% over the past 12 months and is up 34% this year alone.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
